dir.code: stt_rec, ma_kho, ma_vi_tri, ma_vt, dvt, ma_lo
dir.order: stt_rec, ma_kho, ma_vi_tri, ma_vt, dvt, ma_lo

command.text: declare @$none nvarchar(512), @vcID varchar(33), @vcDate smalldatetime, @isLocked tinyint select @vcID = replace(stt_rec, '''', ''), @vcDate = ngay_ct from kkyc with(index(so_ct)) where so_ct = @so_ct and ngay_ct between @ngay_ct1 and @ngay_ct2 if @vcID is null begin select @$none = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Không có yêu cầu kiểm kê theo điều kiện đang lọc.' else N'No data matching filter condition.' end select 'so_ct' as field, isnull(@$none, '') as message end else begin select @isLocked = case when @vcDate <= ngay_ks_kk then 1 else 0 end from dmstt select '' as field, '' as message, 'on$Filter$Retrieve$QueryComplete(this, ''' + @vcID + ''', ''' + replace(replace(@so_ct, '\', '\\'), '''', '\''') + ''', ''' + @ma_kho + ''', ''' + @ma_vt + ''', ' + str(@isLocked) + ');' as script end
